summary: Oakline Auto Finance readiness pack benchmarked as documentation-only with open evidence gaps.
strengths: Core methodology and governance narrative are present.
A sample extract supports limited data profiling.
gaps: Monitoring support is generic and lacks metric thresholds.
Policy exception memo acknowledges unresolved documentation gaps.
Reason-code mapping is partial and uses generic statements for multiple features.
evidence_requests: Provide runnable implementation or reproducibility scripts.
Refresh reason-code mapping for omitted features.
Provide monitoring evidence with explicit thresholds.
